rows.label: tev035501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Niilop about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Niilop about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Niilop about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0001
rows.name:
I've been holed up here so so long pulling
all-nighters that my healthy skin has turned
a ghastly shade of white, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0002
rows.name:
My brother Giogion is worried sick,
and considering how laid back he
usually is, that's saying something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0003
rows.name:
I suppose I should go to Cauldros, maybe?
The Pathfinder keep mentioning a volcano
in the area called Mount M'gando.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Anyway, if I hop in there, I
should crisp right back up
into my normal color, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0005
rows.name:
As soon as I get a break in in my work,
I'm making the travel arrangements...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0008
rows.name:
This whole time I've been holed
up in the Arms research lab
developing weapons, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0009
rows.name:
This is my first trip back to the ship in what feels
like forever. And after all those all-nighters, I think
I'm too tired to even remember how long it's been?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Still, I hope the weapon the Arms
collaborated on helped you with your fight
against the Growth. ...Er, it did, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0011
rows.name:
The last of the Larsians are
still holding out in Valley
of Oblivion, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you take good care of the Arms, we'll
make sure you can handle any threat,
all right? And that is a promise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0013
rows.name:
This whole time I've been holed up
in Candid & Credible's research lab
developing weapons, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is my first trip back to the ship in what feels
like forever. And after all those all-nighters, I think
I'm too tired to even remember how long it's been?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Still, I hope C&C's weapon helped
you with your fight against the
Growth. ...Er, it did, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0016
rows.name:
The last of the Larsians are still holding
out in Valley of Oblivion, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you take good care of our company, we'll
make sure you can handle any threat out
there, all right? And that is a promise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Niilop about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Niilop about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0018
rows.name:
De Zing is gone, as you probably know? I got
so used to the...extra attention that that
things really felt off once he disappeared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0019
rows.name:
I asked around, and it sounds like he
went to Cauldros to hunt indigens?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0020
rows.name:
I have to to admit, I didn't give him enough credit.
It takes a lot of guts to go out there and tackle those
things with nothing but a katana, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0021
rows.name:
I can't let him show me up,
right? I need to get back to
work on a new kind of hypersteel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0022
rows.name:
You told me this wouldn't
happen, didn't you?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0023
rows.name:
De Zing has has started
stalking me again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Now the Larsian is saying I need to help him come
up with a katana for for Dolls! Can you believe
that nonsense? Why won't he leave me alone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0025
rows.name:
True, the the idea DOES
sound interesting...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035501_MSG0026
rows.name:
The problem is that common sense kicks in and
tells me I need to put a million miles between
him and me, if you know what I mean?[ST:wait ]
